channel.title: Modal Labs
channel.description: Modal Labs — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: Unpacking sandbox startup latency: why started ≠ ready
item.description: Building performant sandbox systems goes way beyond the initial container boot. Here, we unpack what that means, and discuss some tools to help you manage the entire lifecycle.

item.title: Introducing Modal Auto Endpoints: Optimized inference you actually own
item.description: LLM inference at SotA speeds and Modal quality, now available to everyone.

item.title: Achieve state-of-the-art inference latencies with speculative decoding
item.description: How Modal and Decagon worked together to cut inference latency - and you can too.

item.title: Routing for serverless servers with Pingora, Envoy, and Spanner
item.description: A deep dive inside our new ultra-low-latency primitive.
